goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt record artifact builder for release governance audit receipt record authorities without merges, PRs, GitHub calls, durable records, audits, durable writes, or external release actions.
scope_out: Do not write durable records, receipts, or audits, perform durable writes, consume approved actions, merge, open PRs, call GitHub, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Release audit receipt record authority artifacts can produce an in-memory record artifact without merge, PR, or GitHub action.
Recorded-at ref and audit receipt record evidence ref are required.
Audit writes, merge, external actions, action consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit receipt record persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing recorded-at ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Durable record write, receipt write, audit persistence, durable write, approved action consumption, merge, PR creation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-190 authorized release audit receipt record artifacts without recording them.
